title: coleus descampsii
intro: Coleus descampsii is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the coleus, which is a genus of herbs, shrubs, and small trees native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Coleus descampsii include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits associated with Coleus descampsii include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Coleus descampsii are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
